name: forge-state
description: Local-first lab bench for open-source projects: inbound 🧪 reactions in Slack plus wild-source harvesters (GitHub code search, RSS feeds, curated author watchlist). Nightly forge researches/builds/experiments/packages/publishes. Includes a self-reflection skill (forge-introspector) that reads forge's own capability walls and proposes how to overcome them.

plugins.name: forge-state
plugins.description: Lab bench for open-source projects. 14 skills: state spine, orchestrator, 4 harvesters (slack + github + rss + watchlist), researcher, builder, experimenter, packager, reporter, publisher, the EXP-0006-emitted agentic-rl runner, and forge-introspector (self-reflection on capability walls).
